description: A customer has a small chip in their windshield and wants to know if it can be repaired.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer about the size and location of the chip to determine if it's repairable (e.g., smaller than a quarter, not in the driver's line of sight).

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the chip is likely repairable based on the customer's description.

nodes.task_description: Check if the customer's auto insurance covers glass repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent advises the customer that many insurance policies cover chip repair with no deductible.

nodes.task_description: Schedule an appointment with the dealership's glass repair specialist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the repair appointment.
